name: canshare-who-male-breast-primary-minus-nipple-histology
title: NZ WHO male breast primary (no nipple) histology
description: Histologies used for male breast primaries, except for the nipple (excluding benign), from WHO Classification of Tumours, Breast Tumours (latest edition) - Sections 3. Fibroepithelial tumours and hamartomas of the breast, 5. Mesenchymal tumours of the breast, 7. Tumours of the male breast or an 'Other' value.
